summary:
Iteration 14 (note: spec said iteration_10 but iterations 10-13 already exist; this is the 14th). Frontend-only end-to-end validation of the Fivecodelab rebrand on https://software-staging.preview.emergentagent.com. RESULT: 26/27 spec checks pass; ONE compliance string ('100% genuine') still leaks on 2 pages (homepage FAQ accordion + page.php?slug=why-choose-us heading). Otherwise all new layouts, interactions and branding are functional and correct. Tested as guest user (no login needed).

VERIFIED PASSING:
(1) HOMEPAGE — title 'Fivecodelab Software | Genuine Microsoft Software Licenses — Instant Delivery'; navbar brand 'Fivecodelab Software'; data-testid='hero-showcase'/'hero-product-glass'/'hero-apps-pill'/'hero-delivery-pill' all present; hero-rating-chip reads '★ 4.6/5 · 5,519+ verified reviews'; all 5 hero-slide-0..4 and hero-dot-0..4 elements present; initial visible slide=0; click hero-dot-3 reveals slide-3 (slide-0 also briefly visible during CSS fade transition — functionally correct).
(2) BEST SELLERS spotlight — data-testid='bestseller-spotlight' present with one large featured product (Office 2019 Pro Plus, $129.99 Save 63%) + working Add to Cart (data-testid='add-to-cart-microsoft-office-2019-professional-plus-windows'); data-testid='bestseller-side-list' present with 3 compact rows (Office 2024 Pro Plus / Windows 10 Pro / Office 2021 Pro Plus), each with round add-to-cart-{slug} button.
(3) PICKED FOR YOU strip — data-testid='picked-for-you' renders 8 strip-card-{slug} cards in a horizontal overflow-auto container (overflowX=auto verified via getComputedStyle), each with rating, price, and working Add button.
(4) ADD-TO-CART END-TO-END — added 1 item from spotlight + 1 from side list + 1 from picked-for-you strip → cart.php correctly shows '3 items in your cart' with all 3 products listed (Office 2019 Pro Plus, Office 2024 Pro Plus, Office Home & Business 2019 Mac), correct subtotal $464.97 and savings; cart UI fully branded Fivecodelab.
(5) SHOP PAGE — default view = LIST (view-list-btn has class 'btn-primary' active, view-grid-btn has 'btn-outline-secondary'); data-testid='shop-list' contains 37 wide horizontal banner rows with data-testid='product-row-{slug}' (e.g. 'product-row-microsoft-office-2024-professional-plus-windows'); Add to Cart + Details buttons render; sidebar filter-cat-office, etc. present; view-grid-btn / view-list-btn toggle works.
(6) CATEGORY PAGE (slug=office) — single card data-testid='category-list' with 20 compact rows (data-testid='product-row-{slug}'), each having thumbnail/name/stars/platform/discount badge/price/round add-to-cart-{slug} button; data-testid='platform-windows' / 'platform-mac' / 'platform-all' filter pills present; data-testid='category-sort' present and clickable.
(7) BRANDING — every page (home, shop, category, product, about-us, affiliate, contact, blog, cart, faqs, why-choose-us) shows 'Fivecodelab Software' in navbar brand/footer/title; footer address '12266 Heritage Dr, Moreno Valley, CA 92557' present with 'View on Google Maps' button (verified on multiple pages).
(8) CTA BAND on home — class 'cta-band' present with copy 'Get Your Microsoft Office License Today / Authentic perpetual licenses with professional support and instant delivery. Join 50,000+ satisfied customers.' Renders as emerald gradient consistent with theme.
(9) DARK MODE — data-testid='theme-toggle' flips html[data-bs-theme] to 'dark'; new hero showcase, spotlight, strip cards, shop rows, category rows all remain readable in dark theme (visual check via screenshot).
(10) PRODUCT REGRESSION — product.php?slug=microsoft-office-2024-professional-plus-windows returns 200, page renders; data-testid='chat-bubble' present and click opens data-testid='chat-panel'.
(11) Other pages: blog.php / about-us.php / contact.php / affiliate.php / cart.php / page.php?slug=faqs all return 200, no broken HTML, no console errors observed.
(12) Compliance strings NOT present on home/shop/category/product/about-us/affiliate/contact/blog for: '100% Genuine' (capital G), '#1', 'cheap', '180-day', '180-Day' — all confirmed scrubbed.

critical.exact_text: Yes, all our licenses are 100% genuine and sourced directly from authorized Microsoft distributors. Every license key is verified for authenticity before delivery.
critical.source: DB row in `faqs` table (see /app/php-version/database.sql line 279). The 'faqs' table is loaded by the homepage FAQ accordion via includes/footer or homepage section.
critical.fix: Re-seed the faqs row OR run: UPDATE faqs SET answer = REPLACE(answer, '100% genuine', 'genuine') WHERE question LIKE 'Are these genuine%'; — and update database.sql line 279 to remove '100% genuine'.

critical.source: DB row in `pages` table (see /app/php-version/database.sql line 438, UPDATE pages SET content = ... WHERE slug = 'why-choose-us'). Also same content block still references 'UCODE SOFTTECH' twice and email 'support@ucodesofttechus.com' twice in the seed.
critical.priority: HIGH (Google Ads non-compliant superlative + leftover old brand name in DB seed)
critical.fix: Update database.sql line 438 (and live DB) to: (a) remove '100% Genuine Products' heading -> 'Genuine Products', (b) replace 'UCODE SOFTTECH' -> 'Fivecodelab Software', (c) replace 'support@ucodesofttechus.com' -> 'services@fivecodelabsoftware.com'.

action_items: FIX compliance: remove '100% genuine' from the homepage FAQ answer (faqs table row 'Are these genuine Microsoft Office licenses?'). Live SQL: UPDATE faqs SET answer = REPLACE(answer,'100% genuine','genuine'); also update /app/php-version/database.sql line 279.

FIX compliance + branding: in /app/php-version/database.sql line 438 (page slug='why-choose-us'), replace '100% Genuine Products' heading and the two leftover 'UCODE SOFTTECH' / 'support@ucodesofttechus.com' mentions. Then re-run the UPDATE against the live MySQL DB so page.php?slug=why-choose-us reflects the rebrand.

OPTIONAL hygiene: scan /app/php-version/database.sql for any other 'UCODE SOFTTECH' / 'ucodesofttechus' leftovers in seed pages/email templates (grep -n 'UCODE\|ucodesofttech' database.sql) to avoid re-seeding old brand on fresh deploys.
critical_code_review_comments: data-testid pattern: spec described testids as 'add-to-cart-software-staging' / 'product-row-software-staging' / 'strip-card-software-staging' — the actual implementation uses per-product slug (e.g. 'add-to-cart-microsoft-office-2024-professional-plus-windows'). This is the correct pattern for unique per-row identification; the spec string was clearly a placeholder/example. Verified live: all spotlight/side-list/strip/shop-row/category-row buttons follow data-testid='add-to-cart-{slug}' and rows follow 'product-row-{slug}'.

Shop default view: $view defaults to 'list' (shop.php line 10) — verified live, view-list-btn has 'btn-primary' (active) and shop-list children are wide product-row banners. Toggle to grid works and preserves filters via ?view=grid query param.

Hero rotator: hero-slide visibility CSS uses opacity/transition rather than display:none, so during slide change BOTH the outgoing and incoming slide briefly satisfy is_visible(). Functionally correct (users perceive a fade) — testers should assert via active dot class or current opacity, not is_visible() of two slides.

Cart badge: cart-count-badge starts with class 'd-none' and shows count when items added — works correctly but is NOT exposed via a stable data-testid (only data-testid='cart-button' on the wrapper anchor). Recommend adding data-testid='cart-count' on the <span class='cart-count-badge'> to make Playwright assertions cleaner.

Compliance content lives in MySQL (faqs + pages tables), not PHP files. Future Google Ads compliance scans must include a SQL content audit, not just a code grep — content can drift on production without code changes.

success_rate.frontend: Functional/UX: 100% (all layouts, interactions, branding, dark mode, cart, chat, hero rotator, filters work). Compliance: 8/10 pages clean — 2 pages (homepage FAQ, why-choose-us) still contain '100% genuine' from DB seed.

test_credentials: None used — all flows tested as guest. Note: /app/memory/test_credentials.md still references old brand (admin@ucodesofttechus.com); per the review request, new admin should be admin@fivecodelabsoftware.com. Did not need to log in.
seed_data_creation: Added 3 items to guest cart during add-to-cart end-to-end test (Office 2019 Pro Plus, Office 2024 Pro Plus, Office Home & Business 2019 Mac) — session-only, no DB writes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new layouts (home spotlight + side list + picked-for-you strip; shop wide rows; category compact list) and all interactions (hero dot click, rotator, add-to-cart from each of the 4 layouts, view toggle, platform filters, dark mode, chat) are FUNCTIONAL on https://software-staging.preview.emergentagent.com. Only remaining gap before sign-off: scrub '100% genuine' / '100% Genuine' from the live MySQL `faqs` and `pages` tables (see action_items). After the SQL UPDATE is applied + /app/php-version/database.sql is patched at lines 279 and 438, re-run a single compliance grep across home and page.php?slug=why-choose-us. data-testid pattern: anything using per-product slug (add-to-cart-{slug}, product-row-{slug}, strip-card-{slug}, side-seller-{slug}). Cart badge has no data-testid yet — recommend adding 'cart-count' for cleaner assertions.
rca of the issue: The compliance regex misses on '100% genuine' originate from DB-seeded content, not PHP code. (a) Homepage FAQ accordion is rendered from the `faqs` MySQL table; the row 'Are these genuine Microsoft Office licenses?' still has the old answer string with '100% genuine'. (b) page.php?slug=why-choose-us renders the long-form pages.content blob from /app/php-version/database.sql line 438 which still contains '100% Genuine Products' heading and leftover 'UCODE SOFTTECH'/'support@ucodesofttechus.com' references. Reproduction: visit https://software-staging.preview.emergentagent.com/ and expand the 'Are these genuine Microsoft Office licenses?' FAQ; or visit /page.php?slug=why-choose-us and view source. Mitigation: (1) UPDATE faqs SET answer = REPLACE(answer,'100% genuine','genuine') WHERE answer LIKE '%100%% genuine%'; (2) UPDATE pages SET content = REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(content,'100% Genuine Products','Genuine Products'),'UCODE SOFTTECH','Fivecodelab Software'),'support@ucodesofttechus.com','services@fivecodelabsoftware.com') WHERE slug='why-choose-us'; (3) edit database.sql at lines 256, 279, and 438 to keep the seed in sync.
